description: Phase 34: Security Hardening + Compliance - Add threat model (STRIDE), pen test utilities (OWASP Top 10 scanner, API fuzzer), secret management, container security (distroless Dockerfile, Trivy config), mTLS configuration, WAF rules, multi-layer rate limiting, and comprehensive compliance framework (GDPR, DPDP 2023, CCPA, COPPA, PCI-DSS, SOC 2) to @quant/security and infra/.
steps: 1. Add packages/security/src/core/threat-model.ts: Implement ThreatModeler class using STRIDE methodology. Methods: modelService(service, assets, interfaces) returns threats per category (Spoofing, Tampering, Repudiation, Information Disclosure, Denial of Service, Elevation of Privilege), assessRisk(threat) returns severity+likelihood+impact, generateMitigations(threats).

2. Add packages/security/src/core/pen-test-scanner.ts: Implement PenTestScanner class that checks for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities programmatically. Methods: scanEndpoint(url, method, headers) for injection, broken auth, sensitive data exposure, XXE, broken access control, misconfiguration, XSS, insecure deserialization, known vulns, insufficient logging. Returns findings with severity and remediation.

3. Add packages/security/src/core/api-fuzzer.ts: Implement APIFuzzer class for automated API security testing. Methods: fuzzEndpoint(endpoint, schema, iterations), fuzzHeaders(endpoint, maliciousHeaders), fuzzPayload(endpoint, basePayload, mutations). Generates edge cases: SQL injection strings, XSS payloads, boundary values, null bytes, unicode exploits.

4. Add packages/security/src/core/secret-manager.ts: Implement SecretManager class for secure secret handling. Methods: getSecret(key) retrieves from vault (interface-based), rotateSecret(key, newValue), auditAccess(key) returns access log, validateNoSecretsInEnv(envVars) checks for leaked secrets. Supports AWS Secrets Manager and Vault backends via adapter pattern.

5. Add packages/security/src/core/container-security.ts: Implement ContainerSecurityScanner class. Methods: validateDockerfile(content) checks for non-root user, distroless base, no secrets in layers, minimal packages; generateSecureDockerfile(service, baseImage) produces hardened Dockerfile; scanImage(imageRef) interface for Trivy integration.

6. Add packages/security/src/core/mtls-config.ts: Implement MTLSConfigurator class. Methods: generateCertificateConfig(service, ca), validateCertChain(cert, ca), configureMesh(services) returns Istio/Linkerd PeerAuthentication and DestinationRule configs as YAML strings.

7. Add packages/security/src/core/waf-rules.ts: Implement WAFRuleEngine class with OWASP Core Rule Set patterns. Methods: evaluateRequest(request) returns block/allow/challenge decision, addCustomRule(rule), getBlockedRequests(timeRange). Covers SQL injection, XSS, path traversal, command injection, file inclusion patterns.

8. Add packages/security/src/core/compliance-framework.ts: Implement ComplianceFramework class covering GDPR, DPDP 2023, CCPA, COPPA, PCI-DSS, SOC 2. Methods: auditCompliance(framework) returns checklist with pass/fail per control, generateDPIA(service, dataFlows), generateSBOM(dependencies) returns CycloneDX format, checkDataRetention(service), checkConsentRecords(userId).
9. Add infra/helm/quant-platform/templates/mtls-policies.yaml: Istio PeerAuthentication and DestinationRule for strict mTLS between all services.
10. Add Dockerfile.secure template at infra/docker/Dockerfile.secure: Multi-stage build with distroless final image, non-root user, read-only filesystem, no shell, minimal layers.
11. Add infra/trivy/trivy.yaml: Trivy configuration for container scanning with severity thresholds and ignore patterns.
12. Add docs/threat-model.md: STRIDE threat model document covering all services with identified threats, risk ratings, and mitigations.

13. Add docs/compliance/ directory with: docs/compliance/gdpr.md, docs/compliance/ccpa.md, docs/compliance/pci-dss.md, docs/compliance/soc2.md, docs/compliance/dpdp-2023.md, docs/compliance/coppa.md. Each doc covers: applicable controls, implementation status, evidence requirements.
15. Update packages/security/src/index.ts barrel to export all new modules.
16. Update packages/security/src/types.ts with new types for threat modeling, pen testing, compliance, WAF, mTLS, container security.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm test passes for @quant/security with all new test files
All new modules are exported from packages/security/src/index.ts
docs/threat-model.md exists with STRIDE analysis per service
docs/compliance/ directory has all 6 compliance documents
infra/docker/Dockerfile.secure exists with hardened container template
